calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Sep-18-2020 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Appellant, Defendant Ibarra Professional Law Corporation, Chris Ibarra the moving party.
Respondent, Plaintiff Josefina Calzada the opposing party.

This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo. All parties are sworn.

Appellant, Defendant Ibarra Professional Law Corporation, Chris Ibarra testifies on his behalf.

Respondent, Plaintiff Josefina Calzada testifies on her own behalf.

At the conclusion of the case, the matter is taken under submission.
Judge Pro Tem Henry Shain, Clerk A. Datt, Not Recorded. (525)
